summary: PVP Mode Testing - Backend APIs working correctly, pvp_room_id is properly returned. Frontend lobby and game creation flow works. Need to verify full 2-player flow with WebSocket game_start event propagation.

minor.issue: Returns 404 when game is not in 'ready' state (expected behavior but confusing UX)

integration_issues.issue: Need to verify pvp_room_id propagation from game_start WebSocket event to PVPBattleArena component

action_items: Verify WebSocket game_start event includes pvp_room_id in frontend console logs
Test full 2-player flow with both users in separate browser contexts simultaneously
Verify PVPBattleArena receives pvpRoomId prop correctly
critical_code_review_comments: Backend correctly returns pvp_room_id in start game response
Lobby WebSocket broadcast_game_start includes pvp_room_id parameter
GameLobby.jsx correctly passes pvp_room_id to onGameStart callback
PhotoGameArena.jsx handleGameStart correctly resolves pvpRoomId from multiple sources
seed_data_creation: Both test users have 5+ battle-ready photos
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend PVP flow is working correctly - all API tests pass. The pvp_room_id is correctly returned from /api/photo-game/open-games/start/{game_id}. Frontend testing shows lobby works, but need to verify the full 2-player flow with WebSocket events. Key files: GameLobby.jsx handles lobby WebSocket, PVPBattleArena.jsx handles game WebSocket. The critical path is: Lobby countdown -> game_start event with pvp_room_id -> PVPBattleArena connects to /api/ws/pvp-game/{room_id}/{token}

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: The PVP flow requires two simultaneous browser sessions to properly test. Backend APIs are working correctly - pvp_room_id is returned. The issue may be in the frontend WebSocket event handling or state propagation.
reproduction_steps: 1. User 1 logs in and creates a PVP game
2. User 2 logs in and joins the game
5. game_start event should be received with pvp_room_id
6. PVPBattleArena should render and connect to PVP WebSocket
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Backend is working. Need to verify frontend WebSocket event handling in GameLobby.jsx and state propagation to PVPBattleArena.jsx
